content: Test your knowledge of England's previous opening games at World Cups. How much can you remember?

zh.title: 世界杯测验：英格兰历届首场比赛
zh.summary: 这份知识竞赛考验球迷对英格兰世界杯历史首场比赛的了解。它挑战读者回忆英格兰历届赛事表现的细节。

title: Extraordinary Messi makes more history in masterclass for the ages
summary: While Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland impressed in their World Cup debuts, Lionel Messi's masterclass performance stole the spotlight on a day featuring multiple superstars. His extraordinary display added another historic chapter to his tournament legacy.
content: Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland both enjoyed a fine start to the World Cup - but on a day packed with superstars, Lionel Messi still took top billing.

zh.title: 非凡的梅西在史诗级表演中再创历史
zh.summary: 虽然基利安·姆巴佩和埃尔林·哈兰德在世界杯首秀中表现出色，但莱昂内尔·梅西的大师级表演在这个云集多位超级巨星的日子里成为焦点。他的非凡表现为他的世界杯传奇再添一段历史篇章。

title: Are World Cup hydration breaks important? Or do they stop teams' momentum?
summary: The World Cup's mandatory hydration breaks have effectively converted two halves into four quarters, aligning with FIFA's interests. The article examines whether these stoppages impact player performance and tactical approaches.
content: The World Cup's mandatory hydration breaks have turned two halves into four quarters, which suits FIFA, but does it impact the players and tactics?

zh.title: 世界杯补水休息重要吗?或者它们会阻碍球队的势头?
zh.summary: 世界杯强制补水休息实际上已将两个半场转换为四个四分之一,符合国际足联的利益。这篇文章考察了这些停顿是否会影响球员表现和战术方法。

title: Haaland on World Cup debut for Norway? Goals were ...

content: null

zh.summary: 埃林·哈兰德代表挪威首次参加世界杯,并展现了令人印象深刻的进球表现。他早期比赛的表现表明他可能是挪威在整个比赛中的关键球员。

title: Listen: Latest from Scotland at World Cup & Rangers' big decision
summary: Scotland's World Cup performance is receiving renewed appreciation as stronger teams stumble in the tournament. The country also faces significant decisions, including Rangers' managerial considerations.
content: As big teams slip up is Scotland's win looking better by the day?

title: 'Atalanta eye Rangers' Raskin' - gossip
summary: Italian club Atalanta is reportedly targeting Rangers midfielder Nicolas Raskin for a transfer move. There is also speculation surrounding Heart of Midlothian's managerial future if Derek McInnes departs for Rangers.
content: Atalanta are reportedly interested in Rangers midfielder Nicolas Raskin, while there is plenty of speculation about who Heart of Midlothian will appoint should head coach Derek McInnes move to Ibrox.

zh.title: 亚特兰大看中流浪者队拉斯金 - 转会传言
zh.summary: 意大利俱乐部亚特兰大据报道正在争取流浪者队中场球员尼古拉斯·拉斯金的转会。此外，关于米德洛锡安俱乐部主教练德里克·麦金尼斯是否会离开加盟流浪者队的未来也充满猜测。

title: 🎩 Who has scored a men's World Cup hat trick?
summary: A historical retrospective of World Cup hat tricks, with Lionel Messi being the most recent player to achieve this feat. The article documents the exclusive list of players throughout men's World Cup history.
content: Lionel Messi was the most recent player to score a hat trick in the World Cup. See who else joins him on the list in history.

zh.title: 谁在男足世界杯上进过帽子戏法？
zh.summary: 关于世界杯帽子戏法的历史回顾，其中莱昂内尔·梅西是最近一位实现此壮举的球员。该文章记录了整个男足世界杯历史上实现此成就的球员名单。

title: Messi ties Klose record with 16th World Cup goal
summary: Lionel Messi tied Miroslav Klose's all-time record of 16 World Cup goals by scoring a hat trick in Argentina's 3-0 victory over Algeria. The milestone represents another historic achievement in Messi's legendary World Cup career.
content: Lionel Messi made history Tuesday night by tying the record for most men's World Cup goals at 16 with Miroslav Klose after scoring a hat trick and staking Argentina to a 3-0 lead over Algeria before coming off late in the second half.

zh.title: 梅西以第16粒世界杯进球与克洛泽并列纪录
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西在阿根廷3-0击败阿尔及利亚的比赛中打进帽子戏法，与米罗斯拉夫·克洛泽创造的16粒世界杯历史纪录并列。这一里程碑代表了梅西传奇世界杯生涯中又一历史性成就。

title: Live updates: Messi leads Argentina in title defen...
summary: Argentina defend their World Cup title with Lionel Messi leading the squad in what could be his final tournament appearance. Live coverage captures key moments as Argentina pursues back-to-back championships.
content: null

zh.title: 直播更新：梅西领导阿根廷卫冕世界杯
zh.summary: 阿根廷以莱昂内尔·梅西领导的阵容捍卫世界杯冠军，这可能是他最后一次参加锦标赛。直播报道捕捉了关键时刻，阿根廷追求连续两年夺冠。

title: Mbappé rewrites France, World Cup history books as...
summary: Kylian Mbappé scored twice to lead France to a Group I opening win over Senegal, advancing his record in World Cup history. The match took place in New Jersey on Tuesday.
content: Kylian Mbappé made history with a pair of goals that sent France on their way to a Group I opening win over Senegal on Tuesday in New Jersey.

zh.title: 姆巴佩改写法国、世界杯历史
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩打入两球，带领法国在第一组开幕战中战胜塞内加尔，推进了他的世界杯历史纪录。比赛在周二于新泽西州进行。

title: Mbappé scores twice, sets France record in win
summary: Kylian Mbappé surpassed Lionel Messi on the all-time World Cup scoring charts with two goals in France's 3-1 victory over Senegal. He also became France's all-time record goalscorer in World Cup history.
content: Kylian Mbappé moved ahead of Lionel Messi in the all-time World Cup scoring charts and became France's record goalscorer with two goals in Les Bleus' 3-1 Group I win against Senegal.

zh.title: 姆巴佩打入两球，创造法国胜利纪录
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩在法国3:1击败塞内加尔的比赛中打入两球，超越了莱昂内尔·梅西的世界杯历史进球纪录。他同时成为了法国世界杯历史上的进球王。

title: Iran's Torabi cleared to re-enter U.S. for WCup
summary: Iran forward Mehdi Torabi has been cleared to enter the United States for the World Cup after visa issues were resolved by the State Department. His participation was previously in doubt due to the visa complications.
content: The U.S. State Department said on Tuesday that the visa issue that would have prevented Iran forward Mehdi Torabi from entering the U.S. for the next World Cup has been resolved.

zh.title: 伊朗托拉比获准重新进入美国参加世界杯
zh.summary: 伊朗前锋梅赫迪·托拉比在美国国务院解决签证问题后获准进入美国参加世界杯。由于签证问题,他的参赛资格之前一度存疑。

title: 👀 Cape Verde GK Vozinha is a social media star!
summary: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha, a 40-year-old journeyman, has become one of the most beloved players at the 2026 World Cup thanks to his engaging social media presence. His experience and personality have resonated with fans worldwide.
content: Cape Verde GK Vozinha is a 40-year-old journeyman who is now one of the 2026 World Cup's most beloved players.

zh.title: 佛得角门将沃津哈是社交媒体明星
zh.summary: 40岁职业门将佛得角门神沃津哈因其迷人的社交媒体风格,成为2026年世界杯最受欢迎的球员之一。他的经验和人格魅力赢得了世界各地球迷的共鸣。

title: Neymar trains alone for 1st time at Brazil WC camp...
summary: Neymar trained for the first time since arriving at Brazil's World Cup camp after recovering from a month-long right calf injury. The forward's return to training on the pitch sidelines marks important progress in his recovery.
content: Neymar, who has been out for a month with a right calf injury, trained on the pitch sidelines on Tuesday for the first time since arriving in the United States.

zh.title: 内马尔在巴西世界杯营地首次单独训练
zh.summary: 内马尔在恢复右小腿一个月的伤病后,在巴西世界杯营地首次进行了训练。这位前锋回到球场训练标志着他康复过程中的重要进展。

title: Haaland scores two in WC debut as Norway win
summary: Erling Haaland scored twice in his World Cup debut for Norway against Iraq, taking just 29 minutes to net his first goal. Norway won convincingly 4-1, with Haaland establishing himself as one of the tournament's standout players.
content: Erling Haaland took just 29 minutes to score his first ever World Cup goal on his tournament debut against Iraq on Tuesday. By the end, he had scored twice in a convincing 4-1 victory and delivered on his tag as one of this tournament's biggest stars.

zh.title: 哈兰德世界杯首秀梅开二度 挪威4-1胜伊拉克
zh.summary: 埃林·哈兰德在对伊拉克的世界杯首秀中打进两球，仅用29分钟就攻入首球。挪威以4-1的比分大胜，哈兰德确立了自己作为本届赛事明星球员之一的地位。

title: Berhalter says Poch taught U.S. 'what we're about'...
summary: U.S. midfielder Sebastian Berhalter credits manager Mauricio Pochettino with transforming the team's culture and mindset. Berhalter indicates Pochettino has instilled a more assertive approach to how the team conducts itself.
content: United States midfielder Sebastian Berhalter said that one of the ways manager Mauricio Pochettino has changed the culture within the team is instilling a mindset where they don't "take s---."

zh.title: 伯哈尔特称波切蒂诺教会了美国队"我们的本质"
zh.summary: 美国中场塞巴斯蒂安·伯哈尔特将球队文化和心态的转变归功于主教练毛里西奥·波切蒂诺。伯哈尔特表示波切蒂诺灌输了球队更具进取性的行动方式。

title: Partey misled Canadian officials over previous arrest
summary: Ghana midfielder Thomas Partey will miss the team's World Cup opener after his visa appeal was denied following immigration issues. Partey had misled Canadian officials regarding a previous arrest.
content: Thomas Partey will miss Ghana's World Cup opener after an appeal against the decision not to grant him a visa is turned down.

zh.title: 帕蒂就前科事项误导加拿大官员
zh.summary: 加纳中场托马斯·帕蒂因移民问题签证申诉被拒，将缺席球队世界杯首场比赛。帕蒂曾就之前的逮捕事件向加拿大官员隐瞒信息。

title: Highlights: Haaland scores twice in Norway win over Iraq
summary: Erling Haaland scored twice as Norway opened their World Cup campaign with a dominant 4-1 victory over Iraq. The performance marked a successful start for the Scandinavian side.
content: Erling Haland scores two goals as Norway begin their World Cup 2026 campaign with a 4-1 win against Iraq.

zh.title: 高光时刻：哈兰德攻入两球 挪威4-1战胜伊拉克
zh.summary: 埃林·哈兰德打入两球，挪威以绝对优势的4-1战胜伊拉克，开启了世界杯之旅。这场胜利标志着斯堪的纳维亚球队的完美开局。

title: England will not adapt style despite USA heat - Tuchel
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel has stated the team will not adjust its playing style at the World Cup despite challenging heat conditions. Tuchel believes maintaining their tactical identity is more important than adapting to environmental factors.
content: Thomas Tuchel says he is "not ready to adapt" England's playing style at the World Cup despite the heat - as it would "give up" the team's strengths.

zh.title: 英格兰不会因美国高温改变风格 - 图赫尔
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔表示，尽管世界杯期间天气炎热，但球队不会调整比赛风格。图赫尔认为保持战术特色比适应环境因素更重要。
